ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emission data */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "poll_code" INTEGER /* Code associated with the pollutant */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant reporting the emissions */,
  "site" TEXT /* Site where the emissions were measured */,
  "easting" REAL /* Easting coordinate for the location */,
  "northing" REAL /* Northing coordinate for the location */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the plant */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector responsible for the emissions */,
  "emission" REAL /* Reported amount of emissions */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for emissions */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the plant is located */,
  "datatype" TEXT /* Data type indicator */,
  "emissions_kt" REAL /* Emissions in kilotonnes (KT) */,
  "emission_date" TEXT /* Date of the emission */,
  "emission_time" TEXT /* Time of the emission */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for measuring or estimating the emissions */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the reported data */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the reported emissions */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the emission record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_datatype FOREIGN KEY ("datatype") REFERENCES data_types ("datatype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_poll_code FOREIGN KEY ("poll_code") REFERENCES pollutants ("poll_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the plant */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the plant was established */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status of the plant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate for the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "poll_code" INTEGER /* Code for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the pollutant */,
  "hazardous_level" TEXT /* Level of hazard associated with the pollutant */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., oil & gas, manufacturing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Standard industry code for better classification */,
  "regulatory_requirements" TEXT /* Specific regulatory requirements for the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "geographical_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the region */,
  "environmental_laws" TEXT /* Specific environmental laws applicable in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "datatype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "datatype_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., M for measured) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datatype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Tonnes, Kilograms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the operator was established */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score based on compliance and environmental practices */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission record logged */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the emissions were submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., submitted, reviewed) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the emission record */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the emission record was reviewed */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_logs_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_logs_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, analyst, operator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
